programmes.show_description: Flush After Reading: When Francine escapes embarrassment and gets lost in a good book - or five - with Roger, Stan reluctantly spends time at the library.
Amelia: Animated comedy. Louise chooses to research Amelia Earhart for a project, but finds herself grappling with what her final flight means for young women and herself.
Crab-solutely Fabulous: Animated comedy. The Belcher kids recruit Teddy as a nemesis when they put together a costumed wrestling act for the Crustacean Nation Wrestling Federation.
Wrong Reasons: The first episode of the sitcom. A fresh intake arrives at Norbourne Police Training College, but some of them have more legitimate reasons to be there than others.
The Phallus: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. When the boys meet an old school friend who is now a hotshot urban lawyer, Stylax uses his mate to reconnect with an old flame of his.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Tweet Suite / Cut in Half / Desert Menu: Animated series. Sylvester gets hungry for room service when Tweety Bird goes to a hotel, and Bugs Bunny expands a buzzard's palette.
Boardwalk Bunny / Crossbow / Cat Fished: Animated series. Yosemite Sam runs crooked carnival games, Elmer Fudd's crossbow leaves him cross, and Granny's got a hot date.
Animated series about the superhero team. The Titans discover the joys of eating breakfast food for every meal, but it could lead to an old friend becoming too powerful.
Worst in Show: Animated adventure series. When a giant houndbeast attacks an elite dog show, the gang go undercover and enter Scooby in the show in order to solve the mystery.
Mysteries on the Disorient Express: Animated adventure series. Fred is pleasantly surprised to discover a monster mystery on board a mystery-free three-day cross-country train trip.
In London, dancer Kea hopes to be impressed by the choices of three single lads. Will any of them shine?

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. The Shepherds are excited for Nelly's photo shoot for her first solo designer range, and the family raise money for charity by getting down and dirty.
Reality series. The gang celebrate Jordan's 30th birthday with a Moulin Rouge themed party. However, not everyone is in the mood to celebrate.
Reunion Part Two: US reality series. Alexia and Larsa's backstage row escalates, Lisa is sickened when the group doesn't show her sympathy, and Nicole discusses her father's passing.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: A Perfect Storm Out: US reality series. Bozoma hosts a healing spa day for the ladies, but it is anything but serene when Sutton objects to a stormy escape by Kyle.
Married couple Arj and Charlotte are back to continue their game before the turn of best friends from Northern Ireland Phil and Arainn sees them play a thrilling game.
Graham Norton welcomes former airport security official Sheila, housing supervisor Leo, and SEN teacher Austin to face the mighty Wheel and spin to win a possible 50,000 pounds.
The cast jet off to Portugal for sun, sea and drama as Dan and Ella are reunited for the first time since their break-up and Freddie sends messages that cause tension in the group.
Healing and Reeling: Reality series. Seema and Sheena are desperate for a reconciliation and organise a friendship retreat in Thailand to try to force the ladies together.
Reunion Part Three: US reality series. The ladies revisit their iconic trip to Mexico City before an unexpected guest closes out the reunion with a surprise performance.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Beachy Keen: US reality series. Garcelle invites the ladies to her beach house, but a rude interruption on the way there causes Dorit to take pause with Sutton.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a Soccer Aid special of the classic game show with David James, Chelcee Grimes, and Marvin Humes all trying to guess well-known phrases in aid of charity.
Graham Norton invites novelty shop owner Jess, learning and development trainer Xhemal, and former GP Pip to hold their nerve and spin the Wheel to win a possible 50,000 pounds.
Ant and Dec are back and trying to give away the biggest cash prize in TV history - competitive father-and-daughter duo David and Emma hope that this will be to their benefit.
Making a State-ment: US cooking competition. 50 hungry chefs from all corners of the USA enter the arena, but only 20 of them will survive the first cut to carry their state's flag.
Fat Gun: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter stars as Maverick - alongside his family and his friends - in a typically loving parody of the classic 1986 film Top Gun.
The Dating Game: Quagmire becomes obsessed with dating apps, but loses his sexual prowess. Stewie enjoys the extra attention when he is forced to wear a back brace.
The Young Parent Trap: Lois and Peter are mistaken for young parents at Stewie's school and are invited to live in a millennial apartment complex, leaving Meg and Chris home alone.
Dr. Sunderson's Sunsuckers: US animated comedy series. Hayley and Jeff help one of Roger's personas run a solar company.
Comb Over: A Hair Piece: US animated comedy series. Stan does something about his secret baldness and gets the help of Josay Bosay, Roger's famed hairstylist-to-the-stars persona.
Fight at the Not Okay Chore-Ral: Animated comedy. The Belchers end up in a bedtime story showdown when Bob and Linda suggest that the kids should take on more household chores.
Radio No You Didn't: Animated comedy. The unearthing of an old radio in Bob and Linda's bedroom cupboard leads Bob to tell his family a story of Second World War espionage.
Lindsey joins Stephen Mulhern as she goes up against the Banker and tries to open the right boxes in the right order to avoid joining the infamous 1p Club.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Feline Lucky / A Prickly Pair: Animated series. Sylvester is all in when he spots Tweety Bird in a casino, and Beaky Buzzard learns that love can hurt.
Wrong with the Wind / Pigs' Feet / Moody at the Movies: Animated series. Porky wishes people would 'leaf' him alone, Daffy performs a magic 'feet', and a family of bears ruin a film.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. The Titans' antics with their imaginary friend Captain Cool annoy Robin until make-believe starts becoming real.
Halloween: Animated adventure series. The gang goes trick or treating on Halloween night, but the experience goes wrong when Fred runs into a witch that he met before 11 years ago.
The Curse of Kaniaku: Animated adventure series. The gang meet an ancient monster and try to solve a 700-year-old mystery while on a trip to Japan to visit a friend of Velma.
Tommy, Miguel and Jac compete for the affections of Londoner Remus. Which of the three single shoppers' fashion choices will win them a date?

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Christmas has come early for the Shepherds as they do their first photo shoot as a family of five, but things grind to a halt as Arthur goes AWOL.
The cast jet off to Portugal for sun, sea and drama as Dan and Ella are reunited for the first time since their break-up and Freddie sends messages that cause tension in the group.
Reunion Part Three: US reality series. The ladies revisit their iconic trip to Mexico City before an unexpected guest closes out the reunion with a surprise performance.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Beachy Keen: US reality series. Garcelle invites the ladies to her beach house, but a rude interruption on the way there causes Dorit to take pause with Sutton.
Ant and Dec are back and trying to give away the biggest cash prize in TV history - competitive father-and-daughter duo David and Emma hope that this will be to their benefit.
Support worker Kerrick and coach driver Declan, rail engineer Ricky and civil servant Sarah, and revenue inspector Sadiq and civil servant Shabina try to win 50,000 pounds.
Everyone is hoping for a relaxing time as some of the group head out on a boat to celebrate Amy's birthday while the rest of the gang have a pool day, but the peace doesn't last.
No Woman Is An Island: Reality series. The friendship retreat is in full swing with safaris, cooking and island hopping, but things don't stay harmonious for long.
The Moore the Merrier: US reality series. Porsha and Dennis's relationship hits a rough patch, while Kenya relishes her new role as mother to daughter Brooklyn.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Sweet Home Augusta: US reality series. Sutton plans a trip back home to Augusta with Garcelle and Kyle, but not everyone is met with good old Southern hospitality.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Joe Lycett, Chizzy Akudolu, and Nick Knowles all trying to guess well-known phrases from animated clues.
Graham Norton welcomes former airport security official Sheila, housing supervisor Leo, and SEN teacher Austin to face the mighty Wheel and spin to win a possible 50,000 pounds.
Husband-and-wife team Kevin and Efe ride their luck to try to win life-changing money on the Limitless Ladder, but their dreams for great goals are soon hanging in the balance.
Hell on a Halfshell: US cooking competition. There's something fishy going on as the chefs must shuck and prepare the perfect scallop dishes for Chef Ramsay in a high-stakes test.
Live, Laugh, Love: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter tries to make Joe laugh when he realises that he has never found him funny, and Lois chaperones a school trip for Chris and Meg.
V Is for Mystery: Stewie and Brian solve a series of mysterious murders in Victorian London in a homage to Charles Dickens.
Meg Goes to College: Meg is admitted to Brown University, but after being suspended for her application being a fraud, has to prove she deserves to be there.
Family Time: US animated comedy series. Stan and the family go out to dinner at a buffet restaurant, and Roger becomes a flower.
